# Pokopia Guide

> Pokopia Guide is an unofficial community-driven guide site for Pokémon Pokopia (releasing March 5, 2026). It provides a complete Pokédex, habitat building guides, crafting material lists, and event tracking for new and experienced trainers.

The site is available in English, Traditional Chinese (zh-TW), Simplified Chinese (zh-CN), Japanese, and Korean. All Pokémon data is sourced from Serebii, Game8, and GameWith, and updated automatically.

## Core Pages

- [Pokédex](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex): Complete list of 300+ Pokémon with types, specialties, habitats, spawn times, weather conditions, and favorites
- [Habitat List](https://pokopiaguide.com/habitat): All Pokopia habitats with Pokémon spawn lists, rarity tiers, and building material requirements
- [Habitat Materials](https://pokopiaguide.com/habitat/materials): Complete list of crafting materials and which habitats need them
- [Crafting Recipes](https://pokopiaguide.com/crafting): All 70+ crafting recipes for furniture, cooking tools, lighting, building parts, and decorations with required materials
- [Cooking Recipes](https://pokopiaguide.com/cooking): All 24 cooking recipes with ingredients, flavors, and move buffs (Leafage, Water Gun, Rock Smash, Cut)
- [Events](https://pokopiaguide.com/events): Limited-time events, exclusive Pokémon, and special rewards
- [Guides](https://pokopiaguide.com/guides): Beginner tips, quest walkthroughs, and advanced techniques
- [Dream Island Guide](https://pokopiaguide.com/guides/dream-island-guide): All 7 dolls, 5 island types, materials, legendary Pokémon spawns, and Stardust farming

## Pokédex Features

Each Pokémon entry includes:
- Types, specialties (skills like Grow, Burn, Water, Build, Chop, etc.)
- Habitat locations where the Pokémon can be found
- Spawn conditions: time of day (dawn, day, dusk, night) and weather (sunny, cloudy, rainy)
- Favorites: decoration preferences that affect comfort level (48 categories)
- Obtain method: habitat discovery, story progression, dream island, craft structure, or special quest
- Evolution connections (note: Pokopia has no evolution mechanic — evolved forms are found directly)

## Habitat System

- Pokémon are obtained by building habitats using gathered materials
- Each habitat has common and rare Pokémon
- 190+ habitats with specific material requirements
- Materials include wood, stone, glass, metal, fabric, and specialty items

## Crafting System

- 70+ crafting recipes for furniture, cooking tools, building parts, and decorations
- Recipes organized by category: furniture, decorations, outdoor, cooking tools, building parts, floors/tiles, lighting, transport, special
- Each recipe shows required materials and quantities
- Cooking system: 4 cooking tools (cutting board, pot, frying pan, bread oven) + 4 dishes

## Browse by Type

- [Normal](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/normal), [Fire](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/fire), [Water](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/water), [Electric](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/electric), [Grass](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/grass), [Ice](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/ice), [Fighting](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/fighting), [Poison](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/poison), [Ground](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/ground), [Flying](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/flying), [Psychic](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/psychic), [Bug](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/bug), [Rock](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/rock), [Ghost](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/ghost), [Dragon](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/dragon), [Dark](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/dark), [Steel](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/steel), [Fairy](https://pokopiaguide.com/pokedex/type/fairy)

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://pokopiaguide.com/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap with all pages
- [Chinese Version](https://pokopiaguide.com/zh): Traditional Chinese interface
- [Japanese Version](https://pokopiaguide.com/ja): Japanese interface
